title: CUB Banking Reimagined
subtitle: Innovating CUB's mobile banking for India's evolving digital landscape.
problem_statement: Existing CUB app lacks intuitive design, personalized experiences, and proactive financial management tools for modern Indian users.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for CUB's digital banking experience.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry, uncovering latent user needs.

pillars.title: Security & Trust
pillars.insight: Users need clear security indicators and reassurance for transactions.

pillars.title: Simplicity & Speed
pillars.insight: Users seek quick, effortless task completion without visual clutter.

pillars.title: Control & Clarity
pillars.insight: Users desire full understanding and command over their finances.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: HMW simplify complex banking tasks for users?
HMW personalize financial insights for Indian users?

data.name: ICICI Bank iMobile
cons: UI can be complex, feature bloat

data.name: Google Pay
cons: Not a full bank, limited products

points.name: CUB (Current)
points.desc: Traditional bank, functional but dated UI.

points.name: Paytm
points.desc: High innovation, good UX for payments.

points.name: Google Pay
points.desc: High UX for payments, moderate innovation.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need banking that keeps up with my fast-paced life.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy, manages finances digitally, seeks efficiency and smart financial tools.

personas.name: Priya Patel
personas.quote: My banking app should help me grow my business.
personas.bio: Busy entrepreneur, needs seamless business and personal finance management.

points.action: Replace generic "Daily Expense" with personalized spending insights.
Integrate bill payments with smart reminders and auto-pay options.
points.benefit: Reduces missed payments, improves financial health.

points.action: Adapt social payment patterns for secure, instant group transfers.
Modify "All Features" into a customizable dashboard.
points.benefit: Users access most relevant tools quickly.

pivot.before: Cluttered UI, hidden balance, reactive banking experience.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from transaction-centric to user-centric, proactive financial guidance.
pivot.after: Intuitive, personalized, empowering financial management for users.

annotations.title: Personalized Dashboard
annotations.rationale: Displays relevant info like net worth, spending trends.

annotations.title: Smart Insights
annotations.rationale: Proactive alerts for bills, savings goals, investments.

annotations.title: Contextual Quick Actions
annotations.rationale: Dynamically shows frequent actions based on user behavior.

data.finding: No clear undo/cancel for fund transfer.
"All Features" provides access to many tools.
